achievements.description: Earn 10 points without losing a single Mario in the "Trampoline Time" minigame

achievements.description: Earn 15 Points without drawing more than 20 trampolines in the "Trampoline Time" minigame

achievements.description: Earn 25 points in the "Trampoline Time" minigame

achievements.description: Finish a game of "Shuffle Shell" with one shell earning 1,000 points

achievements.description: Defeat 100 Fly Guys in the "Bounce and Trounce" minigame

achievements.description: Clear 10 levels in the "Connect the Characters" minigame

achievements.description: Play a Full House in the "Picture Poker" minigame

achievements.description: Win big after placing a 5 coin bet on one of the 12 picture slots in the "Mushroom Roulette" minigame

achievements.title: Red or Black
achievements.description: Make a 1 coin bet and win 5 times in the "Mushroom Roulette" minigame

achievements.description: Bet 3 coins and win with 3 matching symbols without hitting any Superstars in the "Mario Slot" minigame

achievements.description: Get at least 100 Coins from the "Super Mario Slot" minigame

achievements.description: Hit a Lakitu in the "Bob-omb Squad" minigame
